creator: richard.bradshaw@blueyonder.co.uk
text:
The termcap database does not have an entry for rxvt-unicode. This means
that programs that need an entry such as vi fail to work when connecting
via ssh using this terminal emulator.

Fix: The rxvt-unicode FAQ has an example termcap entry-the attached patch adds
it to to the termcap.src.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Connect to a FreeBSD machine via ssh using the rxvt-unicode terminal.
